stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to CAP 698 Figure 3.6.
Given the following information, calculate the all-engines obstacle clearance of a multi-engined aeroplane commencing from the end of the take-off with the aircraft at reference zero.

Take-Off Mass: 4000 lb
Airport elevation: 6000 ft
OAT: +16°C
Ground speed: 121 kt
Obstacle height: 2000 ft AGL
Obstacle distance: 15 200 ft from reference zero
Other conditions as per the graph
